# VL-002 overlay: id/path mismatch

Layered onto the corpus at `.verdi/specs/active/wrong-dir-name/spec.md`,
this file's `id: spec/actual-name` disagrees with its containing
directory name (`wrong-dir-name`). VL-002 requires id/path agreement.
